notableEvents.label: Paul Goldschmidt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt grounds into a double play, shortstop Isiah Kiner-Falefa to second baseman Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Paul Goldschmidt out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario walks. Max Schuemann to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero flies out to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
